---
title: "Research Group"
description-meta: "Research group, coming soon."
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
---

::: {style="text-align:center; padding: 3rem 1rem;"}

<i class="fa-solid fa-people-group" style="font-size:3rem; color:#05336B;"></i>

## Coming soon

I am building a research group focused on energy systems modeling and the low-carbon transition in Latin America. Details will be shared here soon.

In the meantime, I am a member of the [UREMA Research Unit](https://www.uninorte.edu.co/web/urema){target="_blank"} at Universidad del Norte.

[← Back to home](index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary role="button"}

:::
